questions.question: What lifecycle hooks should a cached component use instead of `onMounted`/`onUnmounted` when switching tabs?
What does the `max` prop on `<KeepAlive>` control?
options: The maximum number of components that can be rendered simultaneously
The maximum number of cached instances, evicting the least recently used when exceeded
The maximum time in milliseconds before a cached instance is invalidated
The maximum component tree depth that KeepAlive will traverse

questions.question: Why is `shallowRef` recommended when storing the currently active tab component?
options: Because component definitions are not reactive and `ref` would throw
To avoid Vue creating deep reactive proxies for the component object itself
Because `ref` cannot hold object values, only primitives
To allow the component to be garbage-collected immediately on tab switch
